profile.name: Talha Sami
profile.title: Software Engineer | Flutter Developer | UI/UX Enthusiast
profile.subtitle: Passionate Flutter developer focused on clean architecture, smooth UI/UX, and solving real-world problems through code.
profile.introduction: Hi, I'm Talha Sami. I build cross-platform mobile apps, desktop systems, and interactive experiences.
profile.biography: I'm a second-year Software Engineering student at FAST Islamabad with a strong passion for coding and problem-solving. Dedicated to continuous learning, I actively explore new technologies, from algorithms to AI. I aim to grow into a top-tier software engineer by building real-world projects, enhancing my skills, and staying committed to excellence.
profile.currentFocus: Flutter Development, Competitive Programming (550+ LeetCode problems solved), and Teaching (Lab Demonstrator at FAST-NUCES).

timeline.title: Lab Demonstrator - OOP
timeline.description: Assisting students with coding and debugging, clarifying core OOP concepts at FAST-NUCES.

timeline.title: Lab Demonstrator - PF
timeline.description: Supporting students with programming concepts and lab sessions at FAST-NUCES.

projects.title: ExpenseTracker
projects.description: Flutter application with offline-first personal finance management system with optional cloud synchronization, secure local storage, and analytical insights.
projects.architecture: Clean Architecture split into domain, data, and presentation layers utilizing BLoC pattern for state separation.
projects.challenges: Synchronizing offline edits safely once a network connection is re-established.
projects.lessonsLearned: Learned conflict resolution protocols and queue-based batching.

projects.title: shoesShopApp
projects.description: A lightweight, educational Flutter shopping app built to explore UI layout, state management with Provider, and basic e-commerce flows.
features: Stateful cart system with Provider updating totals in real time
projects.architecture: MVC structure mapped with Provider bindings.
projects.challenges: Flicker-free updates on cart quantity adjustments.
projects.lessonsLearned: Optimized listeners to prevent redundant widget rebuilds.

projects.title: weatherApp
projects.description: A small, focused Weather App built with Flutter — a practice project while learning Flutter. It demonstrates networking, JSON parsing, and responsive UI.
features: Caching profiles to save network request counts
projects.architecture: Simple repository pattern with async API connections.
projects.challenges: Handling network latency errors gracefully with visual fallback states.
projects.lessonsLearned: Built elegant retry mechanisms and local JSON cache policies.

responsibilities: Assisting undergraduate students with lab assignments, coding challenges, and debugging in C++.
Clarifying core OOP concepts like inheritance, polymorphism, and memory management during lab hours.
Evaluating lab submissions and providing constructive feedback.
achievements: Mentored 50+ students, helping raise average lab assessment scores.
Designed practice OOP exercises for student labs.

responsibilities: Supporting students in learning basic programming constructs (loops, conditionals, arrays, pointers).
Guiding students through logic building and algorithm development in C++.
achievements: Conducted review sessions for students struggling with basic programming fundamentals.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering
achievements: Active member of the Competitive Programming Club

competitions.title: FETX Competition
competitions.description: Secured 1st place in the prestigious FETX event, demonstrating advanced technical problem-solving and innovation.

competitions.title: Soventure Bug Buster
competitions.description: Top performer in the challenge, specialized in debugging, system optimization, and efficient algorithmic solutions.

testimonials.name: Sarah Jenkins
testimonials.quote: Talha transformed our complex data feeds into an incredibly beautiful, intuitive 3D dashboard. Our customers are absolutely thrilled with the new interactive experience.

testimonials.name: Marcus Vance
testimonials.quote: Working with Talha was seamless. The ExpenseTracker project was delivered ahead of schedule and the clean architectural design has scaled perfectly as we've onboarded new sensors.

githubRepos.name: LeetCodePractice
githubRepos.description: This repository contains my solutions to LeetCode problems solved during Data Structures and Algorithms practice. Each problem is organized in its own folder using the respective LeetCode question number, making the repository easy to navigate and reference.

githubRepos.name: portfolio
githubRepos.description: This portfolio is designed to present technical expertise and project achievements in a minimalist, accessible format. It serves as a central hub for my professional profile, including project repositories, certifications, and contact information.

githubRepos.description: No description provided.

githubRepos.name: ExpenseTracker
githubRepos.description: Flutter application with offline-first personal finance management system with optional cloud synchronization, secure local storage, and analytical insights.

githubRepos.name: shoesShopApp
githubRepos.description: A lightweight, educational Flutter shopping app built to explore UI layout, state management with Provider, and basic e-commerce flows. This repository contains a small catalogue UI, product details, and a cart flow implemented for learning and experimentation.

githubRepos.name: weatherApp
githubRepos.description: A small, focused Weather App built with Flutter — a practice project while learning Flutter. It demonstrates networking, JSON parsing, simple state management, and a responsive UI.

githubRepos.name: my_chat_app
githubRepos.description: My Chat App is a modern, user-friendly chat application built with Flutter. It allows users to communicate in real-time, share images, and manage their profiles seamlessly. The app is designed to provide a smooth user experience with a clean and intuitive interface.

githubRepos.name: taskSimulation
githubRepos.description: A compact C++ OOP demo implementing a role-based task and messaging system with policy enforcement, authentication (OTP + simple hashing), auditing, and basic anomaly detection — ideal as a learning/demo project or a starter for a production-ready system.

githubRepos.name: XonicGamePF
githubRepos.description: Xonic is a compact 2D game implemented in C++ using the SFML library. This repository contains the game source, assets, and helper files to compile and run locally inside a Linux development environment or container.

githubRepos.name: RushHour
githubRepos.description: RushHour is a compact C++ graphical project that demonstrates basic object management and rendering using the header-only CImg library. The codebase is intended as a small demo and learning resource for working with simple game-like objects, rendering, and lightweight asset usage.

githubRepos.name: ManagementSystems
githubRepos.description: Collection of console-based management system projects in C++ using OOP, including Library, Banking, Student Records, Inventory, Voting, Calculator, and Flight Reservation systems.

githubRepos.name: WebScraping_PredictionModel
githubRepos.description: Two data science projects: house price prediction using web-scraped data from Zameen.com, and PUBG player statistics analysis with exploratory and statistical insights.

githubRepos.name: TicTacToeGUI
githubRepos.description: This project is a Tic Tac Toe game developed in C++ using the SFML graphics library. It provides a modern GUI with multiple gameplay modes including AI, classic, tournament, and speed battles. The game also supports user login and sign-up functionality with persistent score tracking.

githubRepos.name: ShopingPortalOnline
githubRepos.description: An Online console based shopping portal along with all options vendor admin manager and product addition and many more options

githubRepos.name: practiceGit
githubRepos.description: This is for my personal practice

githubRepos.name: Space-Shooter
githubRepos.description: A dynamic, graphics-based space shooter game built with C++ and SFML (Simple and Fast Multimedia Library). Battle waves of enemies, dodge obstacles, and survive increasingly challenging levels with intuitive gamepad and keyboard controls.

githubRepos.name: PredictionModel
githubRepos.description: A comprehensive C++ application for store analytics, sales forecasting, and data-driven decision making. This project implements advanced algorithms for clustering stores, predicting sales trends, and analyzing operational performance.

githubRepos.name: 2048_GAME
githubRepos.description: 2048 is a single-player sliding tile puzzle game. The objective is to slide numbered tiles on a grid to combine them to create a tile with the number 2048.

githubRepos.name: LUDO_SFML_GRAPHIC
githubRepos.description: A compact Ludo board game using SFML for graphics, audio and window management. The project is suitable as a learning exercise for C++ and SFML.

githubRepos.name: SonicGameClone
githubRepos.description: This project is a 2D platformer game featuring Sonic the Hedgehog, implemented with a focus on OOP concepts such as inheritance, polymorphism, and encapsulation. The game includes various game objects, levels, scoring, and a leaderboard system.

githubRepos.name: MagicalPetKingdomGame
githubRepos.description: Magical Pet Kingdom is a simple, self-contained 2D game implemented in C++ that uses the SFML library for graphics, windowing, and audio. The game includes player data, guilds, a menu system, inven…

githubRepos.name: Software-Testing
githubRepos.description: A C++ programming assignment framework designed for educational purposes, featuring a structured template system for algorithm problem-solving with integrated test case validation.

githubRepos.name: UNO_GAME
githubRepos.description: This project is a terminal implementation of the classic UNO card game. It allows two players to play against each other using standard UNO mechanics such as number cards, action cards, and wild cards. Game results are automatically stored in a file for record keeping.

githubRepos.name: Mini-Jarvis
githubRepos.description: Mini Jarvis is a simple voice assistant built using Python that can perform basic voice-controlled tasks like opening Google, playing music, and retrieving system information.

githubRepos.name: MINESWEEPER_CONSOLE
githubRepos.description: Minesweeper Console is a console-based implementation of the classic Minesweeper game. This project allows you to play Minesweeper directly from your terminal.

githubRepos.name: MINESWEEPER_GRAPHICS_SFML
githubRepos.description: This project is a graphical implementation of the classic Minesweeper game using SFML (Simple and Fast Multimedia Library). It aims to provide an enjoyable experience with smooth graphics and intuitive gameplay.
